nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: SETUP: After triggering manually, n8n will prompt for input data. Provide the intake_payload JSON object as shown in the example below. See _meta.intakePayloadExample for a complete example.

nodes.name: Run intake-store-input
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_INTAKE_STORE_INPUT_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of intake-store-input. Find it in the URL when editing that workflow in n8n.

nodes.name: Run import-shopify-data
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_IMPORT_SHOPIFY_DATA_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of import-shopify-data.

nodes.name: Run build-store-profile
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_STORE_PROFILE_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-store-profile.

nodes.name: Run build-market-intelligence
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_MARKET_INTELLIGENCE_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-market-intelligence. Find it in the URL when editing that workflow in n8n.

nodes.name: Run build-brand-positioning
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_BRAND_POSITIONING_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-brand-positioning. Find it in the URL when editing that workflow in n8n.

nodes.name: Run build-competitor-clusters
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_COMPETITOR_CLUSTERS_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-competitor-clusters. Find it in the URL when editing that workflow in n8n.

nodes.name: Run build-strategy-synthesis
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_STRATEGY_SYNTHESIS_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-strategy-synthesis. Find it in the URL when editing that workflow in n8n.

parameters.jsCode: throw new Error('Phase 6c FAILED — GTM Plan synthesis did not return a valid gtm_plan artifact. Check build-gtm-plan execution log.');
throw new Error('Phase 7A FAILED — Store Blueprint synthesis did not return a valid store_blueprint artifact. Check build-store-blueprint execution log.');
throw new Error('Phase 7B.1 FAILED — Shopify catalog deployment failed. Check build-shopify-catalog execution log for errors. Status: ' + ($input.first().json.status || 'UNKNOWN'));
throw new Error('Phase 7B.2 FAILED — Shopify pages/navigation deployment failed. Check build-shopify-pages-navigation execution log for errors. Status: ' + ($input.first().json.status || 'UNKNOWN'));

storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — the full chain runs in both modes. In cloud mode: no artifact persistence, no schema validation, no checkpoint/log writes. shopify_import, store_profile, market_intelligence, brand_positioning, competitor_clusters, and strategy_synthesis flow inline through bridge nodes. Config is supplied via smoke_test_config in the trigger input (no process.env access).
storeOs.chainCoverage: resolve-runtime-config → intake-store-input → import-shopify-data → build-store-profile → build-market-intelligence → build-brand-positioning → build-competitor-clusters → build-strategy-synthesis → build-offer-architecture → build-content-strategy → build-gtm-plan → build-store-blueprint → build-shopify-catalog
setupRequired: Replace REPLACE_WITH_INTAKE_STORE_INPUT_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of intake-store-input
Replace REPLACE_WITH_IMPORT_SHOPIFY_DATA_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of import-shopify-data
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_STORE_PROFILE_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-store-profile
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_MARKET_INTELLIGENCE_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-market-intelligence
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_BRAND_POSITIONING_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-brand-positioning
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_COMPETITOR_CLUSTERS_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-competitor-clusters
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_STRATEGY_SYNTHESIS_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-strategy-synthesis
Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in build-market-intelligence with your OpenAI credential ID
Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in build-brand-positioning with your OpenAI credential ID
Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in build-competitor-clusters with your OpenAI credential ID
Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in build-strategy-synthesis with your OpenAI credential ID
Self-hosted: set all STORE_OS_* environment variables. n8n Cloud: pass values as smoke_test_config in trigger input.
Configure Shopify API credential in n8n and update import-shopify-data with its credential ID
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_SHOPIFY_CATALOG_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-shopify-catalog after deployment
Ensure STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_SHOP_URL is set in env (self-hosted) or smoke_test_config (cloud) for Phase 7B.1
storeOs.notYetImplemented: Phase 7B.2 (pages, navigation, theme), build-pattern-manifest and all subsequent SEO/content phases
